THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY AREA TRADING BAY AREA DIAMOND WHOLESALERS,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EROL KAMER DBA EROL JEWELERS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ADVANCEMENT CONTD. REQUEST DENIED. $10 RETURN TO PLTF.
